title: Adoption Programs in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger adoption programs in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Adoption Programs in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Adoption Programs in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good adoption programs in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Adoption Programs in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
